transcript: In August 2023, police were dispatched to an area following a report of an individual with a firearm in Lacrosse, Wisconsin.
A man was outside mowing his lawn when he noticed a U-Haul truck passing through his alley twice.
Having experienced thefts on his property before, he found the situation suspicious.
The man approached the U-Haul driver, later identified as 38-year-old Josh, and asked what he was doing.
Josh said nothing and drove away.
A few minutes later, as the man walked down the block to his girlfriend's house, he noticed Josh pull up and stop again.
The two began arguing until Josh suddenly reached into the truck, pulled out a firearm, and stated that he would use it if he wanted to.
After being given a description of the vehicle, officers soon located and initiated a high-risk traffic stop.
